backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Jeevan Rakshak backend, defining data types (Medicine, MedicalProfile, SymptomSession) and providing authenticated CRUD endpoints for user profiles, medications, symptom sessions, and profile photos using access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (heart rate monitoring, emergency alert flow, medicine reminders, etc.) to their corresponding frontend source files, UI components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON file containing a single summary entry describing the main App.tsx component's responsibilities including authentication, routing, and global state orchestration.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet that defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Jeevan Rakshak frontend, mounting the React app into a div#root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component handling Internet Identity authentication, page routing (Dashboard, MedicineManagement, HealthChat), profile setup gating, and rendering global overlays for emergency alerts and medicine reminders.
Sticky top navigation header component displaying the app logo, page navigation links, authenticated user profile info with condition badges, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyActivat: Full-screen emergency activated overlay component that displays ambulance call status (102/108), a location-shared confirmation, and the user's medical history summary when a critical heart rate emergency is triggered.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyAlertOv: Full-screen emergency alert overlay component that displays a countdown timer, pulsing animations, Hindi-language prompts, and emergency contact numbers, with a dismiss button to cancel the alert.
frontend/src/components/HeartRateMonitor: Card component that displays real-time BPM with a animated heart icon, ECG SVG visualization, status badge, and a manual BPM input field with reset functionality.
Card component that renders today's medicine dose log entries with taken/skipped/pending status indicators using color-coded rows and icons.
frontend/src/components/MedicineReminder: Dialog modal that prompts the user to take a scheduled medicine, offering taken/snooze/dismiss actions and a secondary view explaining why the medicine is important.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useEmergencyAlert.ts: Custom hook that monitors BPM and manages a three-state emergency alert flow (idle/alerting/emergency) with a 10-second countdown, Web Audio API alarm sound, and dismiss/activate/reset callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartRateSimulatio: Custom hook that simulates a realistic fluctuating heart rate with a 2-second interval, supporting manual BPM override and reset to a default value of 72 BPM.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
Custom hook that polls medicine schedules every 30 seconds to trigger reminders, and provides confirm, snooze, and dismiss actions while maintaining a dose log.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user medical profiles and recording symptom sessions via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSymptomChat.ts: Implements a multi-stage Urdu/Hindi symptom chat flow with predefined advice responses for common symptoms, managing message history and chat stage state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a deep-teal and saffron design token system with light/dark mode CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page component displaying a personalized welcome banner, quick health stats (BPM, medicine doses, status), a heart rate monitor, and a dose log with navigation actions.
frontend/src/pages/HealthChat.tsx: A React chat page component ('Jeevan Rakshak') that lets users select symptoms and converse with a bot, recording symptom sessions via a mutation hook and rendering markdown-like formatted messages.
frontend/src/pages/MedicineManagement.ts: A React page for managing a user's medicine list, supporting add/edit/delete operations with schedule time parsing and saving updates to the medical profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: A React form page for creating or updating a user's medical profile, collecting name, age, emergency contact, chronic conditions, and allergies, then saving via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Jeevan Rakshak frontend, defining a custom color palette (teal, saffron, emergency), typography, border radii, shadows, and animation keyframes with plugin support.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for 'Jeevan Rakshak', an AI health assistant app, including architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and image requirements. Serves as the source of truth for build planning across all implemented features.
